content.text:
I don't have any context about your current situation or what you're working on, so I can't give you specific advice about what to do next!

To help you better, could you tell me more about:
- What you're currently working on or thinking about?
- What your goals are?
- What options you're considering?
- What area of life this relates to (work, personal project, decision-making, etc.)?

Feel free to share as much or as little detail as you'd like, and I'll do my best to help!
